exercises.prompt: The professional sentence length the book prescribes:

options.text: fifteen to twenty words on average
as long as possible, to show mastery

exercises.explanation: Short enough to stay clear, long enough to carry an analysis.

exercises.prompt: Which verbs does the professional style BAN?

options.text: the generic ones — être, avoir, faire, mettre
all verbs in the past tense

exercises.explanation: Generic verbs say nothing; viser le mot juste — concevoir, fabriquer, distribuer.
Étayer — to shore up. Étaler is to spread out (croissants, not arguments).

exercises.prompt: The reckoning section of the rapport.
exercises.template: Le {{b1}} récapitule les acquis et les compétences.
exercises.explanation: Le bilan — the assessment; le billard is the pool table down the hall.

options.text: shared values, working methods, hierarchy — the unwritten part

exercises.explanation: It isn't posted on the door; the rapport's first part proves you inferred it.

exercises.prompt: The golden attitude of the conclusion (critique mais…).
exercises.template: Soyez critique mais {{b1}} : analyser, jamais régler ses comptes.
exercises.explanation: Critical but constructive — the rapport is read by the people it describes.

exercises.prompt: Match each rapport part to its job.
Put the words in order: "Let the text breathe: graphics, paragraphs, space."
Listen to the tutor's feedback. What rule was broken?
exercises.transcript: Votre phrase fait soixante-deux mots, contient trois « faire », et j'ignore toujours ce que vous avez accompli.

options.text: Both style rules at once: sentence far too long, generic verbs everywhere
The report lacked a cover page

exercises.explanation: Sixty-two words and three « faire »: the two style sins in a single sentence.

exercises.prompt: Read this extract from a stage report's conclusion and answer both questions.
exercises.passageFr: Ce stage m'a apporté trois acquis durables. J'ai maîtrisé le logiciel de gestion des stocks, jusqu'aux états de synthèse. J'ai appris à désamorcer un désaccord entre services — l'annexe 4 détaille le cas du mois de mars. Enfin, j'ai confirmé mon choix d'orientation vers la logistique. Un point reste à améliorer : ma prise de parole en réunion, encore hésitante. L'équipe m'a confié des missions réelles ; je conclus que ce stage est une réussite, et j'envisage d'y postuler à l'issue de mes études.
exercises.passageEn: This internship brought me three lasting gains. I mastered the inventory-management software, up to its summary reports. I learned to defuse a disagreement between departments — appendix 4 details the March case. Finally, I confirmed my career direction toward logistics. One point remains to improve: my speaking-up in meetings, still hesitant. The team entrusted me with real missions; I conclude that this internship is a success, and I plan to apply there after my studies.

questions.prompt: How does the writer apply « étayer »?

options.text: The conflict claim is backed by appendix 4 — a referenced exhibit

questions.prompt: Where is « critique mais positif » visible?

options.text: One weakness admitted (speaking up), inside an overall success

exercises.prompt: Why does presentation (pagination, sommaire, captions) matter so much?

options.text: In French professional writing, form IS a competence — it's graded

exercises.explanation: A rapport that can't paginate itself won't be trusted to organise a warehouse.

exercises.prompt: Listen, then choose what it means.
exercises.transcript: Des phrases courtes : quinze à vingt mots en moyenne.

options.text: Short sentences: fifteen to twenty words on average.
The company doesn't 'do' tools: it designs, manufactures and distributes them.
In France, form is a competence: contents page, pagination, captions.

exercises.prompt: What does « un rapport (de stage) » mean?
Fill in the missing word (from this unit's vocabulary).
exercises.explanation: « Le sommaire renvoie aux parties numérotées. » — the table of contents.

exercises.prompt: Match each word to its English meaning.
Speaking practice — listen, then say the sentence aloud and record yourself:
exercises.targetFr: Des phrases courtes : quinze à vingt mots en moyenne.
exercises.targetEn: Short sentences: fifteen to twenty words on average.

exercises.prompt: Speaking practice — say this sentence aloud and record yourself:
exercises.targetFr: En France, la forme est une compétence : sommaire, pagination, légendes.
exercises.targetEn: In France, form is a competence: contents page, pagination, captions.
